name: happy
description: Send the weekly digest — the canonical approval prompt.

input.title: Send the weekly digest to 1,247 subscribers?
input.description: The digest covers the week of May 19–23 and was generated from the analytics roll-up. Reply approve to send now, reject to skip this week.
